description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and a uniform gray color scheme. The sofa features two large, square seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all with a subtle woven texture. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a monolithic appearance. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric, with a slightly rough, tactile surface. The base and sides of the sofa are covered in a coarser, pebbled-texture material, providing a visual contrast to the smoother seat and back cushions. No visible legs are present, suggesting a low-profile, block-style base that sits directly on the ground.
description: A modern, boxy gray sofa with two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and a mix of woven and pebbled textures. The design is monolithic and low-profile, with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the full height of the backrest, with the textured base and seat visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous, pebbled-texture back panel and the sofa's rectangular, block-like form.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the other armrest and the sofa's uniform structure.
description_view_3: Front view showing the two large seat and back cushions, the straight armrests, and the overall symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, square seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a solid, blocky profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa has a solid, block-style base that sits directly on the ground, giving a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest formed by two large, attached cushions with no visible segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Woven fabric with a subtle, grid-like texture on the seat and back cushions, and a coarser, pebbled texture on the base and sides.
